creator: nagilum@nagilum.org
text:
Confirmed!
Works both ways.
Thanks! :)

  Subject: Re: ports/157680: shells/ksh93 fails to install
       To: Nagilum <nagilum@nagilum.org>
       Cc: naddy@mips.inka.de, bug-followup@FreeBSD.org


> Hi,
>
> I've committed a new patch which solves INSTALLROOT issue. I've tested
> it using both gcc from base system and gcc from ports. Please try again.
> Thanks.
>
> Regards,
> sunpoet
>
